channel.title: dotnet/docs-desktop Pull Requests
channel.description: Pull Requests from https://github.com/dotnet/docs-desktop, generated by https://github.com/meziantou/IssuesToRss/

item.title: PR: Add code for my redirect tool - @adegeo
item.description:
This is a small tool I wrote that generates the redirects for this repo. I'm keeping the source in this repo for now.

@luisquintanilla

item.title: PR: Add control event articles - @adegeo
item.description:
Summary

  • Added events overview for controls.
  • Added How to handle events.
  • Moved a common image to the shared folder.

Contributes to #76

@luisquintanilla

item.title: PR: Update popup code - @adegeo
item.description:
Summary

  • Recoded XAML for popup so that it doesn't need a event handler.
  • Removed 2nd popup example that required more code behind to work. Not referenced nor useful right now.

Fixes #216

@luisquintanilla @CheetahChrome

item.title: PR: Port the How to set tab order article - @adegeo
item.description:
Summary

  • Port the How to set tab order article (preview)
  • Clean up some of the other articles in Controls related to See Also links.

Contributes to #76

item.title: PR: LinkFix: .NET desktop (2021-05) - @v-kents
item.description:
This PR is the result of running a Link Repair script on the included content. This script is primarily being run to cleanup links to function correctly in Air Gapped Clouds (AGC). Here's a breakdown of what the script that generated the changes in this PR fixes:

  • docs.microsoft.com Fully Qualified Domain Name (FQDN) Links to either Relative (if in same Repo/DocSet/ContentSet) and Site Relative if not
  • azure.microsoft.com/documentation/articles that reflect to Docs to either Relative (if in same Repo/DocSet/ContentSet) and Site Relative if not
  • All known flavors of MSDN/TechNet domains (we know of 8 or 9 now) that reflect to Docs to either Relative (if in same Repo/DocSet/ContentSet) and Site Relative if not
    • This also includes cleanup of the appended query string for MSDN (redirectedfrom=MSDN).
  • Fixes articles that are redirected in .openpublishing.redirection.json and updates the link to the current final location (this has a lot of customer usability fixes).

Please note the Contributor Guide: Links has been updated with the following link-type preference order:

By order of preference, links hosted on Docs should be Relative if they are in the same repository and docset. If they are in a different docset, even if in the same repository, they should be Site Relative. Links to content hosted on Docs shouldn't use a complete URL, otherwise known as Fully Qualified Domain Names (FQDN). Using a complete URL from Docs to other content on Docs will cause that link to be non-functional in air-gap environments.

item.title: PR: Correct spelling error in the "TextBox or RichTextBox?" paragraph. #1064 - @cdmeillon
item.description:
Summary

Change then to than in the TextBox or RichTextBox? section.

Fixes #1064

item.title: PR: Clarify some porting winforms points - @adegeo
item.description:
Summary

  • Cleaned up some wording
  • Pointed out the upgrade assistant tool
  • Changed forward-slashes to backward-slashes

Fixes #1066

item.title: PR: Fix link to theme files - @adegeo
item.description:
Summary

The link that previously used was incorrect. Noted that these files are installed with Visual Studio

Fixes #1014

item.title: PR: Merge Lavin how to tree iteration to main - @lavin-ds
item.description:
Summary

How to doc updated. 3 projects added under snippets folder for c++, vb and c# projects including samples. The samples include populating the TreeView and then traversing through them printing each node in a message box. The print calls are commented out and on running the application the users will see a Windows form containing a populated tree view.

item.title: PR: Target `@main` in the version-sweep.yml workflow - @IEvangelist
item.description:
Summary

Target @main in the version-sweep.yml workflow.

Related to dotnet/docs#24032

item.title: PR: Recursive sample added for TreeNode iteratation - @lavin-ds
item.description:
Summary

TreeNode iteration documentation updated with an alternate non-recursive approach for traversing the tree using C#.

Fixes #1053

item.title: PR: Clarify a bit of databinding - @adegeo
item.description:
Summary

  • Added a small ## Data context section near the start to help get that concept into memory first.
  • Fixed a few acrolinx issues. ❗ ❗ This article needs an edit pass though ❗ ❗
  • Clarified a few things with tables
  • General edits and additions to help bring out data context and how data binding works.

Contributes to #1020 Fixes #180

@gewarren don't spend too much time on this, I need to send it through an edit pass. It's gigantic and lacks active voice.

item.title: PR: WPF publish initial content - @adegeo
item.description:
Summary

  • Reworks the WPF 5.0 content.
  • Ported and cleaned up various parts of WPF to give a better starting story for the content.
  • Migrated all code samples to new snippets format.
  • Refreshed screenshots.

Contributes to #60

item.title: PR: WPF update XAML article - @adegeo
item.description:
Summary

  • Also clarified some small info in the DataBinding article.

Contributes to #60 Fixes #1028
